Article.ArticleTitle: Hydration and Body Composition in Sports Practice: An Editorial.

Abstract.AbstractText: Assessing hydration status and monitoring body composition represent crucial aspects when discussing the advantages of embracing a healthy lifestyle, given its significant impact on both health and sports performance [...].

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Department of Biomedical Sciences, University of Padua, 35131 Padova, Italy.

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: The author declares no conflict of interest.
